scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:services && npm run build:apps

scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/ops-console && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/mini-program && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/gateway-whatsapp && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/gateway-wechaty && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/gateway-wecom && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/gateway-twilio && npm run build --workspace @delegate-ai/gateway-telegram
